name: Technetium Tc-99m tetrofosmin
description: Technetium Tc-99m tetrofosmin is a drug used in nuclear medicine cardiac imaging. The radioisotope, technetium-99m, is chelated by two 1,2-bis[di-(2-ethoxyethyl)phosphino]ethane ligands which belong to the group of diphosphines and which are referred to as tetrofosmin.
